art_b: Every word in the sentence starts with the same letter.
FF: I really need a cup of coffee.
Please close the front door quietly.
We should leave before it gets dark.
My sister found her keys yesterday.
Let us meet at the corner store.
The bright morning sun feels warm.
Could you pass me that blue plate?
They walked home after the long game.
I forgot where I parked my car.
She baked fresh bread this afternoon.
Our neighbors planted flowers near the fence.
He fixed the broken chair quickly.
Turn off the lights when you leave.
We watched a great film last night.
TF: The dog ran across the muddy yard.
An owl hooted softly in the dark forest.
We watched a salmon leap upstream today.
Her cat slept near the warm fireplace.
